Metadata.title: Incidence Reporting - Santa Ana Urbano
Metadata.description: Public reporting form and admin dashboard for Santa Ana Urbano incidences.

Home.title: Incidence reporting form
Home.description: Use this public form to report issues in the community. Optional emails are stored encrypted and are never shown in the admin dashboard.
Home.submitted: Thanks, your incidence report was submitted.
Home.photosHelp: Upload up to {max} photos in JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, or AVIF format.
Home.emailHelp: Stored encrypted and never displayed to admins.

Errors.invalidDate: Please choose a valid incidence date.
Errors.invalidType: Please choose a valid incidence type.
Errors.invalidReporter: Please provide a house number up to {max} characters.
Errors.invalidDescription: Please provide a description up to {max} characters.
Errors.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.
Errors.tooManyPhotos: You can upload up to {max} photos.
Errors.invalidPhotoType: Only PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, or AVIF image uploads are allowed.
Errors.photoTooLarge: Each photo must be {maxMb} MB or smaller.

Admin.loginHelp: Sign in with the admin password to review and update incidence reports.
Admin.setupRequiredBody: Set ADMIN_PASSWORD in your environment before using the admin dashboard.
Admin.dashboardHelp: Filter reports, update statuses, and manage the public incidence type dropdown.
Admin.typeErrorNameRequired: Please provide a type name up to {max} characters.
Admin.typesHelp: Admins control the options available in the public dropdown.
Admin.noReportsMatch: No incidences match the current filters.
